items.promptRawJa: Afin d'éviter ta crevaison du pneu, quel acte est faut-adopter ?
items.promptGlossEn: To avoid a tire puncture, which action should be taken?
optionsRawJa: A Abaisser la pression de pneu
C Nettoyer les rayures de pneu
D Remplacer le pneu fendillé ou gave abumé
optionsGlossEn: D Replace the cracked or badly damaged tire
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which action to take to avoid a tire puncture; correct meaning is 'check your tires periodically' (French B). Top candidate q0125 is about the wrong measure (mismatch). No existing candidate clearly matches the positive phrasing, so create new. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0125 asks for the 'wrong' measure (opposite intent), not the positive action in the source.
